name: item11_multiscale.csv

constants_used.name: FREEZE_THRESHOLD
constants_used.source: Moore et al. 2008 — Freezing Index threshold; literature-derived, not data-derived

source_artifacts.scope: all PD subjects with walking-task recordings

leakage_rationale: Feature extraction is a deterministic signal-processing pipeline (Welch PSD → bandpower ratio → sliding-window aggregation → wavelet packet entropy → stride detection). UPDRS-III labels never enter this script. The FREEZE_THRESHOLD=2.0 is a fixed literature constant (Moore et al. 2008), not tuned on this cohort. Therefore subject-level features can be used as inductive features in any downstream LGB without per-fold refit.
audit_note: Manifest backfilled per pd-imu-100x-researcher skill provenance requirement. No labels touched the cache; safe for inductive feature concatenation.
